metadata.description: Component reliability tracking for Neuron project. Updated as features are implemented and tested.
metadata.updateFrequency: After each component completes implementation or testing

NeuronAccessibilityService.description: Core L5 NERVE layer - executes accessibility actions
NeuronAccessibilityService.notes: Service starts and binds correctly, event routing works. No unit tests for service itself (instrumentation needed).

UITreeReader.description: L2 PERCEPTION layer - reads UI tree and generates JSON
UITreeReader.notes: 9 tests passing. Prunes, serializes, handles depth limits. Tested on 2 devices.

ActionExecutor.description: L5 NERVE layer - executes NeuronAction objects (tap, type, swipe, scroll, global nav, launch, PressKey)
ActionExecutor.notes: 22 tests passing. Multi-fallback launch + PressKey (IME_ENTER). On-device testing confirms basic actions.

SensitivityGate.description: L3 BRAIN layer - blocks sensitive actions (passwords, banking, editable fields with sensitive text)
SensitivityGate.notes: 24 tests passing. Editable-only text matching prevents false positives on label text.

LLMRouter.description: L3 BRAIN layer - routes between T0-T4 LLM tiers with fallback chain, injects ToolRegistry + workflow hints
LLMRouter.notes: 8 tests passing. Now injects ToolRegistry tools into system prompt and LongTermMemory workflow hints.

IntentClassifier.description: L3 BRAIN layer - classifies command complexity → select tier
IntentClassifier.notes: 21 tests passing. Keyword heuristics for SIMPLE/MODERATE/COMPLEX + domain classification.

PlanAndExecuteEngine.description: L3 BRAIN layer - ReAct loop state machine for multi-step task execution with memory extraction
PlanAndExecuteEngine.notes: 9 tests passing. Now extracts preferences + workflows to LongTermMemory on task completion.

WorkingMemory.description: L4 MEMORY layer - in-memory task state with SharedPreferences backup
WorkingMemory.notes: 11 tests passing. Current task, action history, screen state hash, serialization roundtrip.

LongTermMemory.description: L4 MEMORY layer - Room DB with UserPreference, AppWorkflow, ContactAssociation entities
LongTermMemory.notes: 16 tests passing. Upsert logic, success/fail tracking, fuzzy contact search.

MemoryExtractor.description: L4 MEMORY layer - auto-extracts preferences and workflows after task completion
MemoryExtractor.notes: Extracts app preferences from LAUNCH actions and caches workflow action sequences as JSON.

AppResolver.description: L3 BRAIN layer - 4-step app resolution: known apps → package validation → fuzzy label → intent-based
AppResolver.notes: 25 tests passing. Intent-based fallback handles OEM package name differences (Honor, Xiaomi).

ActionMapper.description: L3 BRAIN layer - maps LLMAction to NeuronAction including NAVIGATE enter/submit/notifications

ToolRegistry.description: SDK layer - in-memory tool registry with register/unregister/invoke/toPromptSnippet
ToolRegistry.notes: 12 tests passing. Duplicate detection, prompt snippet generation, async invoke.

NeuronSDK.description: SDK layer - public API for third-party tool registration
NeuronSDK.notes: Init guard, delegates to ToolRegistry. Tested indirectly via ToolRegistry tests.

SpeechRecognitionManager.description: L1 INPUT layer - wraps Android SpeechRecognizer with state machine and streaming partial results
SpeechRecognitionManager.notes: 15 tests passing. State: IDLE→LISTENING→PROCESSING→IDLE/ERROR. Partial text, final text, error, rmsDb.

ConfirmationGate.description: L5 NERVE layer - blocks irreversible actions (send/delete/pay) until user confirms
ConfirmationGate.notes: 10 tests passing. Checks requiresConfirmation flag, sensitive flag, confidence < 0.7, dangerous keywords.

VoiceInputController.description: L1 INPUT layer - bridges SpeechRecognitionManager with OverlayManager for hold-to-speak
VoiceInputController.notes: 3 tests passing. Hold/release/cancel lifecycle, transcript observation, command callback.

OnboardingScreen.description: L6 OUTPUT layer - 4-step onboarding wizard (Welcome → Permissions → Test → Done)
OnboardingScreen.notes: Compose-only UI. Persists completion state in SharedPreferences.

SettingsScreen.description: L6 OUTPUT layer - API key entry, privacy toggle, memory clear, audit log link
SettingsScreen.notes: Compose-only UI. Settings persist in SharedPreferences.

MCP_Server.description: Protocol Bus - Python MCP server on localhost:7384 with 10 tools
MCP_Server.notes: 14 pytest tests passing. Tool definitions, ADB bridge, handlers all tested with mocks.

OverlayManager.description: L6 OUTPUT layer - floating overlay with 7 states (HIDDEN, IDLE, LISTENING, THINKING, EXECUTING, DONE, ERROR)
OverlayManager.notes: ComposeView-based overlay with accessibility overlay window type. LISTENING state added for voice.

NeuronBrainService.description: L3 BRAIN layer - foreground service hosting brain, command reception via broadcast + binder
NeuronBrainService.notes: Foreground service starts correctly, broadcast receiver works. No unit tests (requires instrumentation).

GeminiFlashClient.description: L3 BRAIN layer - Gemini API client with 4-model fallback chain
GeminiFlashClient.notes: Works on-device when not rate-limited. 4-model chain.

OpenRouterClient.description: L3 BRAIN layer - OpenRouter client with free model fallback chain
OpenRouterClient.notes: Working on-device. Llama 3.3 70B: ~3s latency. 50 req/day free.

OllamaCloudClient.description: L3 BRAIN layer - Ollama Cloud Qwen3-VL 235B thinking model
OllamaCloudClient.notes: Primary T2/T3 provider. Action selection accuracy 86-93%. Latency 8-17s.
